title: Bills of Quantities
description: Build a BOM, apply rates, review compliance and export the priced BOQ.

steps.title: Create a BOM
steps.description: Start from a building, floor or service template.
steps.voiceScript: Start by creating a bill of materials for your building.
steps.captionText: Start by creating a bill of materials for your building.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create a BOM: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Open the BOQ
steps.description: The BOQ nests under each BOM with bills and sections.
steps.voiceScript: Open the bill of quantities to see every bill and section.
steps.captionText: Open the bill of quantities to see every bill and section.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the BOQ: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Apply rates
steps.description: Rate build-up applies markup to material, labour and plant.
steps.voiceScript: Apply your rate build-up so every line carries a real unit rate.
steps.captionText: Apply your rate build-up so every line carries a real unit rate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Apply rates: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Compliance review
steps.description: Missing specs, units and suppliers are flagged by severity.
steps.voiceScript: The compliance review flags missing specifications before you quote.
steps.captionText: The compliance review flags missing specifications before you quote.
steps.fallbackMessage: Compliance review: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: Excel and PDF exports are client-ready.
steps.voiceScript: Export the priced BOQ to Excel or PDF for your client.
steps.captionText: Export the priced BOQ to Excel or PDF for your client.
steps.fallbackMessage: Export: not visible on this page yet.
